synopsis: Appeal by TE Paul W. Lee against Korean Southwest Presbytery's judgment finding him guilty of disobeying citations, rejecting admonitions, and other charges. The Standing Judicial Commission found KSWP erred on all issues through procedural violations including improper admonishment of judicial commission members mid-trial, failure to record trial proceedings, denial of cross-examination rights, and improper censure. Case remanded for retrial or dismissal.
